description.value:
Your salamander reflects the light on its scales that shine brightly. Until the start of your next turn, if you hit and deal damage to a creature adjacent to your salamander, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the start of your next turn unless its level is higher than yours.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-animal-companions.AC-effects.Item.N61xXQczvAV2Xrnj]{Effect: Iridescent Salamander Support Benefit}
